code:
import io
import string

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  mut result = ""
  mut current = ""
  mut first = true
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_boundary = i == n
    if not is_boundary
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          is_boundary = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end

    if is_boundary
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          let doubled = v * 2
          if first
            result = "#{doubled}"
            first = false
          else
            result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
